title: Master Services Agreement — Summary
summary: Three-year master services agreement covering platform integration, support, and professional services. Auto-renews annually unless terminated with 90 days notice. Governing law: Delaware.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.body: Provider delivers software integration, custom development, and tier-2 support as defined in applicable Statements of Work. Out-of-scope work requires written change order.

clauses.title: Fees and Payment
clauses.body: Fees per SOW. Invoices net 30. Late payments accrue 1.5% monthly interest. Client responsible for applicable taxes excluding Provider income taxes.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.body: Mutual NDA terms survive termination for five years. Excludes information publicly available or independently developed.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.body: Aggregate liability capped at fees paid in the prior twelve months. No liability for indirect or consequential damages except for confidentiality breach.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.body: Either party may terminate for material breach uncured after 30 days notice. Client pays for work performed through termination date.
